hero.headline: When you understand yourself,
hero.subheadline: Integrative support to improve your cellular health, your energy and your daily functionality.

problem.heading: The diagnosis is just the beginning
problem.subheading: Between what the doctor recommends and what happens in your daily life, there is often a gap that goes unsupported.

items.title: "I don't know what to buy"
items.description: You left the consultation motivated, but without knowing which products to choose, how to read labels, or which suppliers to prioritize.

items.title: "How do I organize my meals?"
items.description: You don't know how to apply chrononutrition to your real daily routine, with work, family and your existing rhythms.

items.title: "My environment is sabotaging me"
items.description: Cosmetics, water quality, evening light, ongoing stress… factors that keep sending signals of cellular irritability.

items.title: "I feel overwhelmed"
items.description: You see limitations more than possibilities. Changing deep-rooted habits seems impossible and you don't know where to start.

problem.solution: Information is power. When you have it, you can choose. Mind Your Cells connects the dots others look at separately to turn knowledge into action and protocol into real life.

about.heading: About me
about.manifesto: Mind Your Cells is support, knowledge and discernment. Talking about health from the cell is talking about efficiency, responsibility and deep respect for the body.
about.bio1: I am a licensed physiotherapist (no. 9307) with over 10 years of clinical experience, an osteopath with six years of postgraduate training, and a specialist in psychoneuroimmunology (PNEI), trained with Xevi Verdaguer. I have also trained in coaching and emotional intelligence with Joaquina Fernández (Institute of Humanities and Business).
about.bio2: We connect the dots that others look at separately. From small to large. From your cells to your daily life. So you stop wondering whether what you're doing is helping you or not, and start understanding yourself to act in your own favor.

approachItems.title: Systemic
approachItems.description: Health is a global whole made of interconnected systems. Everything fits when you have the right information.

approachItems.description: Plans adapted to your reality, not generic templates. Your body, your rhythm.

approachItems.description: Scientific practices with professional supervision, always within the legal framework.

guarantees.conclusion: If the cell constantly receives irritability signals, it will express inflammation. If we modulate the signals it receives, it can recover its self-regulation. Mind Your Cells helps you create the biological environment that allows that pattern to change.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know before taking the first step

items.question: Does this replace my doctor or treatment?
items.answer: No. Mind Your Cells will never replace your medical guidelines. All professionals who collaborate with us will always respect your doctor and will be happy to work in a multidisciplinary way with them. Our work is to bring all our knowledge and professionalism to uphold your autonomy as a patient — so you can make a solid, free and informed decision about your health, cutting through the noise around what is considered healthy. Specialist programs are also offered to help you implement in your daily life what your healthcare professional — whether a doctor or from another discipline — has recommended. Treatments are never modified without the consent of the professional managing your care.

items.question: Do I need to be following a medical protocol to access the programs?
items.answer: No. If you have a medical condition that requires medical supervision, we will refer you to the professional we consider best suited to your case, working side by side to accelerate your recovery as much as possible while minimising pain and friction. No treatment will be given without first taking a full medical history. Although the premium programs are especially designed for people who already have a medical indication and need help implementing it, we also work with people looking to optimise their health preventively. If you have doubts, book a free call and we'll assess together.

items.question: What are the sessions like?
items.answer: Sessions are individual, by video call, in a personalised and unhurried space. The frequency and number of sessions always depends on the patient's needs. If a program has been chosen, it will be one session per week, never losing sight of the patient's progress, needs and care. Between sessions you will receive resources, follow-up and support adapted to your pace.

items.question: What is the difference between the three programs?
items.answer: The intensity and depth of support. The Implementation Program (4 weeks) covers essential practical foundations. The Personalised Support (8 weeks) includes individual sessions and personalised weekly follow-up. The Comprehensive Follow-up (12 weeks) is the most intensive, with progressive adjustments and close supervision throughout the process.

items.question: Can I pay in installments?
items.answer: The Personalised Cellular Support (8 weeks) and the Comprehensive Cellular Follow-up (12 weeks) are available in 3 installments. The Cellular Implementation Program (4 weeks) requires a single payment. Additionally, if you pay the Comprehensive Follow-up or Personalised Cellular Support in one payment, you save 10% compared to the installment price. Consult conditions during the free assessment call.

items.question: When will I start noticing results?
items.answer: It depends on your starting point and consistency of application. Many people notice improvements in pain, mobility and mental clarity within the first few weeks. It is remarkable how quickly cells respond when you give them a little care. Deep cellular changes are gradual and consolidate throughout the program.

items.question: What happens if I follow the program and don't notice improvements?
items.answer: Each program includes a specific guarantee. If you follow the agreed plan and don't perceive improvements, we extend the support or provide additional sessions at no extra cost. Our commitment is to you and to the process.

items.question: I'm not sure whether to start now — I have lots of professionals looking after me and I'm worried about getting more confused.
items.answer: Our goal is to help you simplify things and make it easier to put into practice everything your healthcare professionals are telling you. We will always walk alongside you, and we will bring everything within our expertise to accelerate your recovery.

items.question: What if I've already seen many professionals and haven't noticed any improvement?
items.answer: Those are the cases that are most grateful to us. By connecting the dots that others look at separately and collaborating across multiple disciplines, the results are remarkable.

brandManifesto.body: When the cell receives the right signals, the body recovers its capacity for self-regulation. Our work is to help you create that environment, from the most everyday to the most profound.
brandManifesto.credentials: Adriana Blanco Durán — Physiotherapist · PNEI · Osteopathy

hero.headline: We are Mind Your Cells
hero.headlineAccent: and we want to help you.
hero.description: Because information is power. When we have it, we can choose and make decisions with respect and care for our body and for ourselves as human beings.

adriana.name: Adriana Blanco
adriana.bio1: I am a physiotherapist, with six years of training in osteopathic medicine and a deep curiosity for understanding how the body tells its own story.
adriana.bio2: While I continue exploring the foundational principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine, Ayurveda and cellular medicine, my approach is based on observing how the body expresses itself: through movement, breathing, skin and tension.
adriana.bio3: In each session I accompany you in your entirety, not just your physical symptoms. I listen to the subtle signals of the autonomic nervous system, understanding that genuine support is born from honoring both science and the human dimension behind every experience.
adriana.bio4: Together we explore gentle and meaningful ways to restore balance and reconnect with the body's natural wisdom.

whoIsItFor.heading: Mind Your Cells is for you if:
items: You experience chronic fatigue, lack of energy, or wake up without feeling rested
You follow a medical protocol but don't know how to implement it in your daily life
You want to optimize your health from the root, not just manage symptoms
You're looking for personalized support that connects body, mind and habits
Your environment (nutrition, light, cosmetics, stress) is affecting your wellbeing
You want to understand why you feel the way you do and act from that knowledge

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: Adriana Blanco Durán, address: Conde de Peñalver 15, Madrid, 28006, Spain. Email: adriana@mindyourcells.com.

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.content: We collect data you voluntarily provide through contact or booking forms: name, email address and any information included in your message. We do not collect specially protected data without your explicit consent.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of processing
sections.intro: Collected data is used exclusively for:
items: Sending health and wellbeing communications, if you have given consent.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
sections.content: Processing is based on your consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR) and, where applicable, on the performance of a service contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR).

sections.title: 5. Data retention
sections.content: Data will be retained for the duration of the contractual relationship or as long as necessary to meet legal obligations. Once the period has elapsed, data will be deleted with appropriate security measures.

sections.title: 6. Recipients
sections.content: We do not share your data with third parties, except as required by law. We use service providers (web hosting, scheduling platforms) acting as data processors under GDPR guarantees.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
sections.content: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection by emailing adriana@mindyourcells.com. You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

sections.title: 8. Security
sections.content: We adopt the technical and organisational measures necessary to ensure the security of your data and prevent its alteration, loss, processing or unauthorised access.

sections.title: 1. Website owner
sections.content:
Adriana Blanco Durán

sections.title: 2. Purpose
sections.content: This legal notice governs the use of the website mindyourcells.com. Use of the website implies full acceptance of the conditions set out herein.

sections.title: 3. Professional activity
sections.content: Adriana Blanco Durán is a licensed physiotherapist no. 9307. All support offered through this website is presented as a complement to medical treatment, never as a substitute. No diagnoses are made and no treatments are prescribed.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual property
sections.content: All content on this website (texts, images, design, logos) is the property of Adriana Blanco Durán or third parties who have authorised its use. Reproduction, distribution or public communication without express authorisation is prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer
sections.content: The content of this website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Adriana Blanco Durán accepts no responsibility for decisions made by users based on the information published.

sections.title: 6. Applicable law
sections.content: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of Madrid.
